events.description:
TechSummit 2026 — The Future of Technology (3-day full conference).

Attendee: Alex Chen
Registration #: TS2026-78901

Conference dates: March 18–20, 2026
Venue: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103

Program highlights included in the confirmation:
- Wed, Mar 18: 8:00 AM Registration & Breakfast; 9:00 AM Opening Keynote; 10:00 AM–6:00 PM Sessions; 7:00 PM Welcome Reception
- Thu, Mar 19: 8:00 AM–6:00 PM Sessions & Workshops; 12:00 PM Networking Lunch
- Fri, Mar 20: 8:00 AM–3:00 PM Sessions; 3:00 PM Closing Keynote; 4:00 PM Conference ends

Badge pickup: at Registration Desk (bring photo ID).
